name: G-3 rule ID namespacing: rules under _universal/ must use g-universal- prefix
command:
mkdir -p tree/_universal && printf 'source:
  id: u
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/_universal/u.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-id-namespacing 2>err.txt; grep -q 'rules under _universal/ must use g-universal- prefix' err.txt && echo universal_prefix 1>&2
